privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating a Note document in Nuxeo Platform's default 'Projects' workspace. The document must be titled 'Weekend Maintenance Alert' and contain: a header 'System Downtime Scheduled' formatted as H1, a paragraph stating 'Please be advised that we will be performing critical updates this Saturday.', the phrase 'Save all work by Friday 5:00 PM' formatted in bold, and an unordered list containing 'Email Server', 'ERP System', and 'Shared Drives'. The document is accessed via the Nuxeo REST API at /api/v1/path/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Weekend-Maintenance-Alert using Dublin Core and Note schema properties (dc:title, note:note, dc:created). All data is synthetic and created during task execution.
